title: RoboticsAction
description: Structured robot action submitted by the autonomy layer for Verify Core policy evaluation before actuation.

robot_id.description: Unique identifier for the robot submitting the action.

mission_id.description: Optional mission or task identifier for audit correlation.

linear_x.description: Forward/backward velocity in m/s (required for move).

angular_z.description: Yaw rate in rad/s (required for move and turn).

zone.description: Declared zone context for geofence policy checks.

human_nearby.description: Whether a human is detected within proximity threshold.

source.description: Origin of the proposed action (e.g. autonomy_planner).
